title: Bonney and Luffy Strike Back
description: On pages 3–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Nami, Marines, Vegapunk, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3 as The Straw Hats, Bonney, the giants, and the Vegapunk broadcast push Egghead toward its escape point while the world learns that the One Piece will decide the fate of the era.
scene: The Straw Hats, Bonney, the giants, and the Vegapunk broadcast push Egghead toward its escape point while the world learns that the One Piece will decide the fate of the era.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The fate of the world depends on pirates?!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: No way!! Will our country sink, too?!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: The Navy has to do something!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The world's greatest genius just said it's real!

dialogue.speaker: Vegapunk
dialogue.text: The one piece is out there!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's about time we pirates ran the show!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The world's gonna sink anyways!! Leave some for us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: the government won't know what hit them!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why are you letting them hear the message?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Every snail in the prison is playing it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But... you'd have to make the WHOLE WORLD KNEEL to you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't tell me you're after... the one piece!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why're you dummies calling it "my world" now?! You don't really want that, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll follow '101J to the depths of hell!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'm sure my information will please you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll put him down if his info is a dud!!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Escape through 44 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
